creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
-------- Forwarded Message --------
From: Alexander Konovalenko <alexkono2000@yahoo.com>
To: gavin@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: www/120435: FreeBSD/amd64 Project -- motherboards UPDATE
REQUEST
Date: Tue, 3 Jun 2008 07:23:56 -0700 (PDT)

Hi,

 I have upgraded my system from 6.3 to 7.0, but anyway
see my dmesg below.

regards,
 Alexander Konovalenko
